name: codex-cms
description: Payload CMS for the hospital site. Authors content, exports markdown to ../src/content for Astro.

scripts.test:commerce:unit: tsx --test tests/commerce-plugin-overrides.test.ts tests/commerce-crypto.test.ts tests/commerce-customer-auth.test.ts tests/commerce-digital.test.ts tests/commerce-giftcards.test.ts tests/commerce-kashier-adapter.test.ts tests/commerce-money.test.ts tests/commerce-order-state.test.ts tests/commerce-payment-state.test.ts tests/commerce-paymob-adapter.test.ts tests/commerce-permissions.test.ts tests/commerce-pricing.test.ts tests/commerce-promotions.test.ts tests/commerce-shipping.test.ts tests/commerce-tax.test.ts tests/commerce-gateway.test.ts tests/commerce-policy-collections.test.ts tests/commerce-quote.test.ts
scripts.test:commerce: npm run test:commerce:unit && npm run test:commerce:integration
scripts.verify:commerce: npm run typecheck && npm run test:commerce && npm run generate:types && npm run generate:importmap && git diff --check
